summary: Phase 4B Visual Cleanup for Compliance File UI - All features tested and working correctly. Evidence rows use neutral grey styling (icon bg-gray-100, border-gray), Check rows use color-driven styling (green=verified, amber=partial, red=not recorded), Agreement rows use color-driven styling, No duplicate verification badges between Evidence and Check rows.
critical_code_review_comments: EvidenceRow correctly uses bg-gray-100 for icon background (neutral grey)
EvidenceRow correctly uses bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 border-gray-300 for Evidence badge
EvidenceRow correctly removed 'Verified' text from file list
EvidenceRow getStatusColor() always returns grey regardless of file count
CheckRow correctly uses color-driven styling: bg-green-100 for verified, bg-amber-100 for partial, bg-red-100 for not recorded
CheckRow correctly shows 'Blocks Readiness' badge only on check rows
AgreementRow correctly uses color-driven styling based on completion status
No duplicate verification badges - Evidence rows show file counts only, Check rows show verification status
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data for employee d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4B Visual Cleanup fully tested. Evidence rows now use neutral grey styling (icon bg-gray-100, badge bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 border-gray-300). Check rows use color-driven styling (green for verified, amber for partial, red for not recorded). Agreement rows also use color-driven styling. No duplicate verification badges between Evidence and Check rows. The 'Proof of Address' section correctly shows amber styling because it's 1/2 verified.

evidence_row_grey_icon.details: All 4 evidence rows have bg-gray-100 icon background

evidence_row_grey_badge.details: Evidence badge uses neutral grey styling (bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 border-gray-300)

evidence_row_neutral_file_count.details: File count badges use neutral styling

evidence_row_no_verified_status.details: Evidence rows show 0 'Verified' badges - verification status removed from file list

check_row_green_verified.details: RTW Check, DBS Status Check, Identity Verification all show green styling (bg-green, border-green)

check_row_amber_partial.details: Address Verification (1/2 verified) shows amber styling (bg-amber, border-amber)

check_row_red_not_recorded.details: Check rows with no check recorded would show red styling (verified in code review)

section_blockers_badge.details: Proof of Address section shows '1 blocking' badge on section header

no_duplicate_badges.details: Evidence rows show file counts only, Check rows show verification status - no duplicates
